header.name: Creator Tools
header.description: A gallery of editor code snippets

_comment_capabilities: SECURITY NOTE: 'script_eval' is required for the mct:eval developer debug command, which enables runtime code evaluation in-game. This is an intentional developer/debug tool — it is NOT intended for production use. The command is restricted to GameDirectors permission level. The Minecraft engine requires this manifest capability to allow new Function() in scripts.
